This measurement was taken 32.5 km downstream of the station.  Assuming an average velocity of 1 m/s, it would take 9 hours for the flow from the station to reach the measurement section.  (32500 m / 1 m/s = 32500 sec / 60 sec = 541 min / 60 min = 9 hours).  The MGH was taken from corrected logger readings 9 hours prior to the measurement from 00:24 - 00:55 = 7.611 m.  This MGH plots the measurment -4.9% off of curve 28.01.  If the logger values from the same time as the measurement are used, the MGH would be 7.602 which plots the measurement -2.12%.  The stage is steadily decreasing between the two time periods.  So even with the uncertainty of the MGH, this measurement plots enough to validate the low end of curve 28.01.  And with the condemned cableway it is the only measurement available for the past two open water seasons. Sources:Manual,Import
